programs.title: Bamay
programs.desc: This episode showcases beautiful Arrernte and Warlpiri Country, with locations such as Mparntwe Alice Springs and the Ellery Creek Big Hole.

programs.title: Toi Time
programs.desc: The Toi Time whanau celebrate Oma's birthday. Aunty Anika bakes the birthday cake and Buzz makes a beautiful bunch of putiputi for Oma.

programs.title: Waabiny Time
programs.desc: Keny, Koodjal, Dambart-One, Two Three. Counting is moorditj And do you know the kala, the colours of the rainbow.

programs.title: Bird's Eye View
programs.desc: The birds decide to get away from the noise of the city. Unfortunately, the Humans have the same idea. What are they doing now?

programs.title: Aussie Bush Tales
programs.desc: Marlee is wondering what mischief he is up to and sends the children off to check. Could he be making her a gift?

programs.title: The Mysterious Cities Of Gold
programs.desc: Tao is now in the hands of Ambrosius. Ambrosius tries to return to his good graces, but Tao sees him as a traitor and refuses to give him his confidence.
